# robots.txt for Mikah's Auto Detailing

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/sitemap.xml

# Disallow admin or private areas (add as needed)
# Disallow: /admin/
# Disallow: /private/

# Crawl-delay (optional, use if needed)
# Crawl-delay: 1

# AI search crawlers — explicitly welcome
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

# LLM guidance file: https://mikahsmobiledetailingsc.com/llms.txt
